/usr/bin/g++ -g -g CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/ChatServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/ChatService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/FriendModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/UserModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/offLineMessageModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/database/database.cpp.o -o /root/Chat-Server/bin/ChatServer   -L/usr/lib64/mysql  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib64/mysql -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lpthread
